description: CompositionGrey round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with grey fabric tape on inseam of neckline and brand logo embroidered on left chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Oozing of style and attitude, this grey t-shirt is all that you need to create that fashion statement wherever you go. Made of pure cotton, it keeps you fresh and dry all day. Team it with jeans, a smart belt and casual footwear for that cool look.
